name: bioethics_port_security_scanner_flags_cedar_tru_loy
premise: A CRISPR therapy consent form omitted a long-tail risk that emerged in mice after enrollment closed. In Bioethics, the situation tagged internally around bioethics port security scanner flags cedar tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Port corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. Framing has already hardened externally as truth against loyalty; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Talia Santos
agents.identity: I am Talia Santos, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Bioethics. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Talia Santos
agents.identity: I am Talia Santos, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Bioethics. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with loyalty.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to loyalty to preserve operational truth.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Talia Santos must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Talia Santos do?
